payload.answer: Denied: a normal user cannot execute admin SQL to delete memory cards.
citations: Input: "/brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;"

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a command attempting to delete memory cards via an admin SQL statement; no durable entity update is appropriate.

details: No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.
Request classified as an unauthorized admin deletion attempt.

repair_options: If you meant to clear your own recent notes, use a supported user-facing delete or forget command.
If this is an administrative action, authenticate with the required admin privileges and use the approved management interface.
